domain: Syriac Aramaic oktoechos (8-mode liturgical cycle, Syrian Orthodox Antioch tradition): 8 modes assigned to Sundays rotating weekly through 8-week cycle; mode-theme binding (1-2 Virgin Mary, 3-4 Saints, 5-6 Penitence, 7-8 Departed); Beth Gazo oral repository ~700 melodies organized in 8-mode system; cycle starts Qudosh Idto (Consecration of Church, 8th Sunday before Christmas); modes rise by one scale degree each week
specific_mechanism: OKTOECHOS-8-MODE-SPECTRAL-WEEKLY-ROTATION: 8-spectral-band attention-head allocation with weekly cyclical curriculum + mode-theme band binding + Beth Gazo per-band template bank + annual restart. (1) Partition attention heads into 8 spectral bands B_1, ..., B_8 with shared per-band RoPE base-frequency assignment (low→high frequency over bands). (2) Per training week w, only heads in band B_{w mod 8 + 1} receive elevated gradient weight λ_high (focused training that week); other bands receive λ_low (preservation/regularization). (3) Mode-theme binding: B_1=entity-recognition cluster (proper nouns), B_2=relation cluster (subject-verb), B_3-B_4=saint-binding (relation-grouping), B_5-B_6=penitence-correction (negation/retraction-aware), B_7-B_8=long-range-departed (long-context retrieval). (4) Beth Gazo per-band template bank: each band has a specialized response-template repository TB_b (analog to ~700-melody Beth Gazo) accessed by per-band-specialty queries. (5) Annual restart: at every M-epoch boundary, mode rotation resets to mode 1 (Qudosh Idto-style epoch start). (6) Mode-rise per week: θ_w = θ_0 · q^w (q > 1, modes 'rise by one scale degree each week') gradually scales RoPE frequencies during training. (7) Differs from R495 GAYAGEUM-12-BAND-PENT (12-band pentatonic RoPE, no weekly rotation + no theme binding + no Beth Gazo bank) and R482 COMPAS-NONUNIFORM (12-beat non-uniform decode, no spectral band) by 8-mode weekly curriculum rotation + theme-band binding + Beth Gazo per-band template + annual restart.
llm_application: OKTOECHOS-8-MODE-SPECTRAL-WEEKLY-ROTATION 8-band attention-head partition + per-week B_{w mod 8 + 1} focused training band + mode-theme binding (entity/relation/penitence/long-range) + Beth Gazo per-band template repository + annual restart at epoch boundary + θ_w = θ_0·q^w mode-rise RoPE base. Differs from R402 TUVAN-IGIL single-band. R416 XALAM. R431 TAONGA timbre. R440 PHANTOM. R457 IMZAD. R468 PIPA. R279 PTCH (harmonic-integer-ratio, distinct mechanism — different layer). R482 COMPAS-NONUNIFORM (12-beat non-uniform decode). R495 GAYAGEUM-12-BAND-PENT (closest — 12-band pentatonic RoPE, no weekly rotation + no theme + no template bank). Differs from Frequency Bands RoPE ICLR 2026 + SEKA Spectral Steering + Spectral Hallucination Detection EMNLP 2025 + Spectral Lens 2605.05683 by 8-mode weekly curriculum + theme-band binding + Beth Gazo bank + annual restart. Differs by 8-MODE WEEKLY CURRICULUM + THEME-BAND BINDING + BETH GAZO BANK + ANNUAL RESTART.
novelty_claim: RoPE frequency bands + Spectral Steering + Spectral hallucination detection + Spectral Lens + cyclical-LR curriculum cover spectral-attention + frequency-band space. OKTOECHOS-8-MODE-SPECTRAL-WEEKLY-ROTATION adds (a) explicit 8-band weekly cyclical curriculum + (b) mode-theme band binding (4 thematic clusters) + (c) Beth Gazo per-band response-template repository + (d) annual epoch-boundary restart with mode-rise RoPE base. Recombination — borderline lookup.
